title: The Ultimate Solopreneur Agent Harness for AI Builders (Claude Code Harness)
summary: Ron Demerit built a "Solopreneur Rig" harness with 16 specialized sub-agents, a product manager agent for dynamic model routing (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku), and session locking for client isolation. The harness powers three real applications: a Spanish-learning music player, a native macOS Whisper transcription tool, and Hermit Host, a self-hosted Netlify alternative.
